title: Worker Result Contract
description: Canonical JSON Schema for delegated worker return payloads only. This contract intentionally excludes task-record, approval, validator, and runtime-gate fields.

status.description: Canonical worker-result status only. This field must remain distinct from orchestrator task states and approval states.

files_changed.description: Ordered list of changed files within declared scope. Use an empty list when no file changes were made.

behavioral_change.description: Concise summary of the implemented behavior change, or an explicit statement that no behavior changed.

validation_results.description: Ordered structured validation command results. This field must not be replaced with a single loose transcript string.

task_local_risk.description: Concise residual task-local risk statement, or an explicit statement that no task-local risk remains.

scope_mismatch.description: Structured scope-expansion request present only when status is scope_mismatch.

blocked_reason.description: Blocking explanation present only when status is blocked.

artifacts_updated.description: Ordered list of generated or supporting artifacts updated by the task.

notes_for_next_task.description: Concise handoff note for the orchestrator or next delegated worker.

command.description: Validation command that was run or attempted.

status.description: Structured validation outcome for the command, distinct from the top-level worker-result status.

exit_code.description: Process exit code produced by the validation command.

summary.description: Concise summary of the validation outcome.

artifacts_produced.description: Ordered list of validation artifacts produced by the command.

required_file.description: Missing file or boundary required to complete the task.

why_needed.description: Why the out-of-scope file or boundary is required.

smallest_scope_expansion.description: Smallest possible scope expansion needed to complete the task.
